svg.title: CrisisBridge — staff response and resolution flow
svg.desc: Flowchart showing staff receiving action cards, acknowledging within 30 seconds, coordinating response, handing over to EMS, and triggering an AI-generated post-incident report.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does a CrisisBridge action card look like?')
sendPrompt('How does the 30 second escalation work in CrisisBridge?')
sendPrompt('What status pills do CrisisBridge staff use?')
sendPrompt('What does the CrisisBridge control room see?')
sendPrompt('What happens when CrisisBridge staff arrive on scene?')
sendPrompt('How does CrisisBridge handle EMS handover?')
sendPrompt('How is an incident closed in CrisisBridge?')
sendPrompt('How does Gemini generate the post-incident report in CrisisBridge?')
